item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 4min One of us 0:11 De PGA TOUR 1 2 8 2 mil
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 4min One of us 0:11 De PGA TOUR 1 2 8 2 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 11min #WATCH — Analysts David Feherety and Arlo White brush’s off reports of LIV Golf’s demise,
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 11min #WATCH — Analysts David Feherety and Arlo White brush’s off reports of LIV Golf’s demise, calling them ‘greatly exaggerated’ & ‘absolute nonsense.’
Do you agree? De David Rumsey 10 7 29 6 mil

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 12min Here’s the video of Arlo White and David Feherty taking the media to task for its
item.description:
Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 12min Here’s the video of Arlo White and David Feherty taking the media to task for its reporting this week.
“This generation has spawned a bunch of fast typists.” De Tee Times 5 8 1 mil
